title: Arcshaper Tools
description: A combat mod adding Arc Shaper tools to Minecraft, combining functions of shovel, hoe, pickaxe, and axe for versatile use.
body:
## Arc Shapers - Versatile Combat Tools Mod
![Mod Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e03b1f85c9fbb275c40a47aa20cbd9574686842.png)

Arc Shapers is a combat-focused Minecraft mod introducing the Arc Shaper, a unique tool that combines the functionality of a shovel, hoe, pickaxe, axe, and sword into one powerful item. Perfect for players who prioritize efficiency, the Arc Shaper adapts to various tasks: create paths on grass like a shovel, till soil while holding shift to act as a hoe, or strip logs and wood when holding control, behaving like an axe. This versatile tool brings streamlined utility to your Minecraft experience, reducing the need for multiple tools in your inventory.

With Arc Shapers, you can streamline your inventory, carrying a single item that covers all essential tool functions. Whether you're building, farming, or exploring, the Arc Shaper is your all-in-one solution. Perfect for survival gameplay and optimized for convenience, Arc Shapers will change the way you play Minecraft.

## How to use?

The Arc Shaper functions like a regular tool for mining and attacking, but it offers special abilities when used with specific key presses:

**Tilling Grass or Dirt**: Hold `Shift` while right-clicking on grass or dirt blocks to till them, transforming them into farmland ready for planting crops!

**Stripping Logs or Woods**: Hold `Control` while right-clicking on any log or wood block to strip off the bark, revealing the smooth wood beneath!

## How to craft?
The Arc Shaper is crafted by placing a Sword in the center of the crafting grid, with a Pickaxe in the top-left, Hoe in the top-right, Axe in the bottom-left, and Shovel in the bottom-right. To craft different types of Arc Shapers, match the tool materials: use Wooden tools for a Wooden Arc Shaper, Iron tools for an Iron Arc Shaper, and so on.
